title: agrostis indica
intro: Agrostis indica is a perennial grass species native to tropical Asia, also known as the Indian bent grass or Indian grass. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Agrostis indica include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Agrostis indica can be prepared into various herbal forms, including decoctions, infusions, and powders, to be used in traditional medicine and as a dietary supplement.
